problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
